fields.label: Countries
fields.hint: ISO-3166 alpha-2 codes of the countries this variation applies in (e.g. DE, FR, US). Comma-separated.

fields.label: Variation type
fields.hint: REGULATORY / OPERATIONAL / CULTURAL / MARKET — what kind of divergence this is.

template.heading: Description
template.purpose: What the variation is, in plain language — what differs from the canonical process.

template.heading: Variation detail
template.purpose: The concrete change — which step, control or hand-off behaves differently, and how.

template.heading: Reason
template.purpose: Why this variation exists — a regulator's rule, a market expectation, a local system constraint.
